name: neatlogs
description: AI agent skills for NeatLogs — the observability and tracing platform for LLM and AI agent applications.

plugins.name: neatlogs-py
plugins.description: Instrument Python LLM applications with the neatlogs SDK — tracing, decorators, spans, prompt template tracking, and auto-instrumentation for OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, CrewAI, and more.

plugins.name: neatlogs-ts
plugins.description: Instrument TypeScript/Node.js LLM applications with the neatlogs SDK — span wrappers, auto-instrumentation, prompt templates for OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, Mastra, Vercel AI SDK, and more.

plugins.name: neatlogs-go
plugins.description: Instrument Go LLM applications with the neatlogs SDK — OpenTelemetry-based tracing for Google Gemini (genai), Google ADK agents, and custom code via Init, WrapGenAI, Trace, and Identify (sessions & end-users).
